channel.title: Speech-to-Text on David Bedoya | Audio & AI/ML Engineering
channel.description: Recent content in Speech-to-Text on David Bedoya | Audio & AI/ML Engineering

item.title: A lo Paisa: Agentic Voice Workflow
item.description: An AI-driven audio transformation pipeline designed to adapt speech into the Paisa dialect of Antioquia (Colombia), using STT, LLM, and TTS.
